# Win/Loss Research

> Independent reference site on win/loss research methodology for B2B SaaS and enterprise technology companies.

**Author:** Daniel Oxenburgh, Founder of Ox (https://www.oxwinloss.com)
**Expertise:** Independent win/loss research, B2B buyer interviews, competitive intelligence, GTM strategy
**Clients include:** HubSpot, Okta, Motive, Pure Storage, Akamai, Outreach, Copado

**Core thesis:** Internal data channels (CRM, rep debriefs, surveys, call recordings) are structurally incomplete because the buyers with the most important perspectives are systematically excluded from vendor-managed feedback loops. Independent third-party buyer interviews are the only mechanism to close this gap.

---

## Ten Pillars (core reference content)

- [Why Internal Win/Loss Data Fails](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/why-internal-win-loss-data-fails/): Why CRM notes, rep debriefs, surveys, and call recordings are structurally incomplete — not from poor execution but from structural exclusion.
- [Independent Win/Loss Research: Why Third-Party Buyer Interviews Work](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/independent-win-loss-research/): What third-party neutrality unlocks and why buyers tell a neutral researcher things they won't tell a vendor.
- [Win/Loss Research Methodology](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/win-loss-research-methodology/): Interview counts, win/loss ratios, timing windows, outreach frameworks, and what separates pattern recognition from anecdote collection.
- [B2B Buying Committee Decisions](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/b2b-buying-committee-decisions/): How B2B purchase decisions actually get made — stakeholders vendors never meet, champion dynamics, and how consensus buying actually works.
- [Win/Loss Research for Competitive Intelligence](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/win-loss-competitive-intelligence/): How win/loss produces CI that rep debriefs structurally cannot — competitive perception at the point of final decision.
- [Win/Loss Research for Product Marketing and Messaging](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/win-loss-product-marketing/): How win/loss surfaces whether positioning is landing and the gap between champion messaging and buying committee consensus.
- [What Win/Loss Research Reveals About Sales Execution](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/win-loss-sales-execution/): Identifying sales process friction patterns and distinguishing execution problems from product or positioning problems.
- [Win/Loss Research for GTM Strategy](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/win-loss-gtm-strategy/): How win/loss findings translate into board-level answers and cross-functional GTM decisions.
- [AI and Win/Loss Research: What Works and What Doesn't](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/ai-win-loss-research/): What AI legitimately improves, where it fails, and why applying AI to internal data compounds the structural problem.
- [How to Build a Win/Loss Research Program](https://winlossresearch.com/topics/how-to-build-win-loss-program/): Internal vs. external programs, vendor evaluation, executive buy-in, findings distribution, and program measurement.

---

## High-priority FAQ pages

- [What is selection bias in win/loss research?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/what-is-selection-bias-in-win-loss-research/)
- [Why does CRM data miss the real reasons deals are lost?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/why-does-crm-data-miss-real-loss-reasons/)
- [Why don't buyers give honest feedback to vendors?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/why-dont-buyers-give-honest-feedback-to-vendors/)
- [How many win/loss interviews do you need?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/how-many-win-loss-interviews-do-you-need/)
- [Why do win/loss surveys produce unreliable data?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/why-do-win-loss-surveys-produce-unreliable-data/)
- [What are the limitations of analyzing sales call recordings for win/loss insights?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/limitations-of-sales-call-recording-win-loss/)
- [Why does AI win/loss analysis fail when applied to CRM data?](https://winlossresearch.com/faq/why-ai-win-loss-analysis-fails-crm-data/)

---

- [Buyer Truth](https://winlossresearch.com/glossary/buyer-truth/)
- [Rep Debrief](https://winlossresearch.com/glossary/rep-debrief/)
